title: selago inaequifolia
intro: Selago inaequifolia, also known as Cape pegtop, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily for treating wounds, inflammation, and skin conditions, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain, inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Selago inaequifolia can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to enhance its medicinal effects.
